title: CS RIN - Steam Underground • Search
text: We need your help! For 17 years, this forum has served us as a platform for sharing games with each other, graciously hosted by the owner of RIN for all this time. Sadly, he can no longer afford our server. To keep this forum alive, we need your help with covering the hosting expenses. For more information, click here . Close CS RIN - Steam Underground cs.rin.ru | csrin.org | The password is usually one of these.
